seoTitle: Bondi vs Bondi Beach — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Bondi and Bondi Beach. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Bondi vs Bondi Beach: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Bondi and Bondi Beach.
heading: Bondi vs Bondi Beach — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Bondi, New South Wales and Bondi Beach, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Bondi has a lower overall climate risk score (43/100) compared to Bondi Beach (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Bondi or Bondi Beach safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Bondi has a flood risk score of 46/100, while Bondi Beach scores 30/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Bondi scores 51/100 for bushfire risk. Bondi Beach scores 50/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Bondi or Bondi Beach?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Bondi has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.95% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
